title: Dave Inc. Reports Strong Q1 2025 Financial Results with 47% Growth
text:
Dave Inc. (Nasdaq: DAVE) announced first-quarter 2025 earnings with impressive growth across major indicators.

Revenue & Profitability:
- Q1 revenue reached $108.0 million, representing 47% year-over-year growth
- Net income totaled $28.8 million
- Adjusted EBITDA surged 235% year-over-year to $44.2 million
- Non-GAAP variable profit margin hit 77%, nearly doubling over three years

Operating Performance:
- ExtraCash originations increased 46% to $1.5 billion
- Monthly transacting members grew 13% to 2.5 million
- New member acquisition reached 569,000 at an efficient $18 cost per customer
- Dave Debit Card spending increased 24% to $488 million
- 28-day delinquency rate improved 33 basis points to 1.50%

Updated 2025 Guidance:
- Revenue: $460-$475M (33-37% growth) from prior $415-$435M
- Adjusted EBITDA: $155-$165M (79-91% growth) from prior $110-$120M

Strategic Developments: CEO Jason Wilk noted the company achieved revenue growth at the fastest year-over-year pace since 2021. The performance reflects successful implementation of a redesigned fee structure that enhanced monetization while preserving customer retention.

The company's board authorized a $50 million share repurchase program, with over $20 million deployed during Q1 through buybacks and stock settlements.
